workItems.title: Implement login UI against auth contract

dependencyContracts.allowedUse: Submit credentials through the declared auth login contract only.

reviewerPrompts.verification-reviewer: Review work item {{workItemId}} verification evidence and confirm the declared commands prove the work. Emit a makeitrealReview envelope.
